overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at dusk. The player approaches a busy intersection with prominent pink and yellow neon signage, crosses the street with pedestrian traffic, and enters a covered tunnel passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated transit line

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath an elevated yellow transit structure, approaching a busy neon-lit intersection

notable_agents.action: family group walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the intersection

entered.detail: large curved yellow elevated structure with integrated lighting
wide staircase leading up to the elevated transit platform
tall palm tree on the sidewalk median
tall modern building with glass and steel facade in the distance
various colorful neon signs including green and pink lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive yellow elevated transit structure. The area is semi-covered with partial sky visibility, illuminated by mixed natural dusk light and artificial neon. Sparse palm trees and futuristic high-rises line the street as the camera approaches a busy intersection ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with neon-lit commercial buildings

events.description: waiting at the crosswalk as vehicles pass through the intersection
beginning to cross the wide yellow-striped crosswalk with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk then crossing the wide intersection alongside other pedestrians while observing the neon-lit surroundings

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection past the crosswalk

entered.detail: building with large bright pink neon sign reading BOHEMIA with XXX symbol
yellow elevated structure with red neon BD SHACK signage spanning the street
tall vertical screen displaying advertisement with woman in white dress
wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes on wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wide open intersection dominated by the bright pink neon 'Bohemia' club on the left and the yellow 'BD Shack' overpass ahead. The camera waits at the crosswalk as cars pass, then crosses the yellow-striped intersection with moderate pedestrian traffic. Large digital billboards illuminate the right side while the wet asphalt reflects the neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian tunnel with security gates and digital advertisements

events.description: entering covered pedestrian tunnel from the open intersection
moving from bright exterior into dimly lit tunnel with strong backlight at the far exit

agents.ego_description: entering a covered tunnel passage and walking toward the bright exit at the far end while following other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in gray shirt walking ahead into the tunnel

entered.detail: large curved concrete arch forming the tunnel entrance
tall vertical metal bars covering storefronts along the tunnel wall
large illuminated screen displaying product advertisements on the tunnel wall
green dumpsters and trash bins lined against the left tunnel wall

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow enclosed tunnel under the BD Shack overpass, transitioning from the bright open intersection to a dimly lit corridor. Metal security gates line the right wall with digital advertisement screens, while trash containers sit on the left. The tunnel stretches ahead with a bright backlight at the far exit, creating a silhouette effect as pedestrians walk toward the light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a semi-covered urban sidewalk through a vibrant neon intersection and into a dimly lit tunnel. It begins beneath a massive yellow elevated transit structure, moving past futuristic high-rises and sparse palm trees under the mixed glow of dusk and artificial light. As the camera reaches a wide open intersection, the environment expands into a bright display of pink and yellow neon signage, where the camera crosses wet, reflective asphalt amidst pedestrian traffic and towering digital billboards. The scene then shifts as the camera enters a narrow enclosed corridor under the overpass, transitioning from the open brilliance of the street to a shadowed tunnel lined with metal security gates and trash containers. Finally, the view stretches forward through the dim passage toward a bright backlight at the far exit, silhouetting the pedestrians ahead.
